title: 3 Under-the-Radar Large-Cap Stocks to Buy in August
text: Diving into three somewhat under-the-radar large-cap stocks that all reported upbeat quarterly results already that investors might want to buy as we head into August.

title: Textron Inc. (TXT) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Eric Salander - Vice President, Investor Relations and Treasurer Scott Donnelly - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Frank Connor - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Peter Arment - Baird Sheila Kahyaoglu - Jefferies Jason Gursky - Citi Bradley Barton - Barclays Noah Poponak - Goldman Sachs Robert Stallard - Vertical Research George Shapiro - Shapiro Research Louis Raffetto - Wolfe Research Cai Von Rumohr - TD Cowen Kristine Liwag - Morgan Stanley Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Q2, 2023 Textron Earnings Release.

title: Textron (TXT) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates,'23 EPS View Raised
text: Textron's (TXT) Q2 revenues of $3,424 million surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1%. Moreover, the reported figure increases 8.6% from the year-ago quarter's tally.

title: Why Textron Stock Is Flying High Today
text: Textron beat on the top and bottom lines, thanks to strong margins in its industrials segment. The company also sees growth ahead for its aviation and helicopter divisions.

title: Is Textron (TXT) Stock Fairly Valued? An In-depth Analysis
text: Textron Inc ( TXT , Financial) recently experienced a 10.41% gain, with an Earnings Per Share (EPS) (EPS) of 4.05. These figures naturally raise the question: is Textron's stock fairly valued?

title: Textron (TXT) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Textron (TXT) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Textron (TXT) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Textron (TXT) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.46 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.20 per share. This compares to earnings of $1 per share a year ago.

title: Textron beats profit estimates on higher pricing of business jets
text: Textron Inc raised its full-year adjusted earnings per share forecast on Thursday, as stronger pricing of business jets and military helicopters continues to offset inflationary costs and drive revenue growth in its Aviation segment.

title: Textron Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results; Raises Full-Year EPS Outlook
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today reported second quarter 2023 income from continuing operations of $1.30 per share, as compared to $1.00 per share in the second quarter of 2022. Adjusted income from continuing operations, a non-GAAP measure that is defined and reconciled to GAAP in an attachment to this release, was $1.46 per share for the second quarter of 2023, compared to $1.11 per share in the second quarter of 2022. “During the second quarter, revenue grew.

title: Is Textron (TXT) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Textron Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share on the company's Common Stock. All dividends will be paid on October 1, 2023 to holders of record at the close of business on September 15, 2023. About Textron Inc. Textron Inc. is a multi-industry company that leverages its global network of aircraft, defense, industrial and finance businesses to provide customers with innovative solutions and services. Te.

title: Textron: Strategic Acquisitions Resulting In Compounding Growth
text: Textron Inc. is currently a buy due to its solid guidance, strong balance sheet, value creation through acquisitions, and undervaluation. The company has a strong balance sheet and has demonstrated resilience and a solid core business model, despite 2020 travel restrictions. Textron's acquisition strategy, including the purchase of Beechcraft, has allowed it to diversify its income streams, improve operating efficiencies, and increase its presence in the military aircraft market.

title: 4 Ideal Barron's Mid-Year 2023 Dividend Dog Buys
text: Barron's Mid-Year Roundtable, Published July 17, listed 40 stocks of note for 2023; 38 of those were unduplicated US publicly-listed companies, of-which YCharts reported 25 as paying dividends. Barron's interviews with their ten financial-industry Roundtable pros tapped human intelligence (HI) to make predictions. Unfortunately, the YCharts screener employed to report current data, dropped seven funds off the list. Nevertheless, the Watchlist tracked by YCharts as of 7/19/23 projected ten top analyst-estimated net gains from ICE, PARA, TXT, AZN, MLI, BIIB, SIEGY, CHNI, TGNA, & topped by SLVM, ranging from 15.53%-31.31%.

title: Will Segmental Sales Aid Textron's (TXT) Earnings in Q2?
text: Textron's (TXT) Q2 results are likely to reflect a solid revenue performance across all business units, which may have aided the overall results of the company.

title: Textron (TXT) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
text: Textron (TXT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Textron Aviation Enhances Passenger Comfort With CoolView Windows in Beechcraft King Air Turboprops
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation has announced a noteworthy upgrade for its Beechcraft King Air 260 and 360 turboprops with the introduction of new CoolView® windows.

title: Textron Aviation Introduces All-New Interiors for Its Iconic Cessna Single-Engine High-Wing Piston Lineup
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation announced today significant enhancements to its iconic Cessna high-wing piston aircraft lineup — the Cessna Skyhawk, Cessna Skylane, Cessna Turbo Skyhawk and Cessna Turbo Stationair HD. Coming in 2024, customers will enjoy a range of new high tech standard features and sleek interior design options including modern and comfortable seating, updated instrument panels and new exterior paint styles. title: Textron (TXT) Wins Contract to Aid UH-1Y & AH-1Z Aircraft
text: Textron (TXT) is set to provide aircraft maintenance as well as engineering services for eight UH-1Y and four AH-1Z aircraft.

title: Textron (TXT) Unit Sends 1st Citation Longitude Jet to Mexico
text: Textron (TXT) unit Textron Aviation delivers its first Cessna Citation Longitude jet to a customer in Mexico. To meet rising demand, the company has produced the 100th unit of the Citation Longitude.

title: Textron Aviation Delivers the First Flagship Cessna Citation Longitude Registered in Mexico
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation announces it has delivered the first flagship Cessna Citation Longitude registered in Mexico.
